productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Basic Green Flip Flops
description: Let your feet talk comfort with this pair of flip flops from converse. Crafted from durable and comfortable material, this pair of flip flops speaks volumes of your happy attitude towards life. Upper Soft rubber straps in a thong style with a toe separator Textured PU footbed for cushioned comfort and ease of wear Print on the forefoot and brand logo printed on the heel for style Outsole Terraced lugs on the PU outsole for absolute grip Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
